name: Philips Hue Color A19 — LCA003 (Gamut C)
notes: Gamut C is Philips' published color triangle for newer Hue Color lamps (LCA001+, LCT016+). Vertices match the diyHue / OpenHAB / johnnap-Hue-API community references.
If the moonlight chromaticity falls outside this triangle, the script projects it onto the nearest gamut edge before sending to the lamp — preventing ad-hoc clipping by Hue's own logic.

To add a profile for a different lamp: copy this file, change model + gamut_vertices to your lamp's published gamut. The script does not need primary SPDs because it computes moonlight chromaticity directly from CIE observer integration; gamut vertices are only used for clamping.
